summary: Portal do Cliente testing completed successfully. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend portal login, dashboard, line expand/collapse, and logout all working correctly. Portal uses separate JWT token type ('portal') distinct from admin tokens.

issues: Phone input formatting limits to 11 digits - users with 13-digit phone numbers (including country code 55) need to enter only the last 11 digits. This is expected behavior for Brazilian phone format.

passed_tests: POST /api/portal/login - Valid CPF+phone returns token and cliente data
POST /api/portal/login - Invalid CPF returns 401
POST /api/portal/login - Valid CPF with wrong phone returns 401
POST /api/portal/login - Missing fields returns 422
POST /api/portal/login - Alternative client login works
GET /api/portal/dashboard - Valid token returns linhas, cobrancas, cliente data
GET /api/portal/dashboard - No token returns 401
GET /api/portal/dashboard - Invalid token returns 401
GET /api/portal/dashboard - Admin token rejected (type != portal)
GET /api/portal/saldo/{numero} - Returns balance data (mock)
GET /api/portal/saldo/{numero} - No token returns 401
GET /api/portal/consumo/{numero} - Returns consumption data (mock)
GET /api/portal/consumo/{numero} - No token returns 401
Frontend: Portal login page renders at /portal with CPF and phone fields
Frontend: Form validation shows 'CPF deve ter 11 digitos' error
Frontend: Login with valid credentials redirects to /portal/dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows client name, CPF, phone number
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Minhas Linhas' section with line status badges
Frontend: Line expand/collapse shows ICCID, Saldo de Dados, Consumo do Mes cards
Frontend: Logout button clears session and redirects to /portal
Frontend: Unauthenticated access to /portal/dashboard redirects to /portal
critical_code_review_comments: Portal uses separate JWT token type ('portal') with 24-hour expiry - good security practice
Phone matching uses last 8 digits comparison - handles both with/without country code
All portal endpoints properly validate token type to prevent admin token reuse
data-testid attributes properly implemented on all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing client Adriano Pinto De Sousa
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portal do Cliente fully tested. Login uses CPF + phone (11 digits without country code). Dashboard shows client info, lines with expand/collapse for saldo/consumo, and faturas. Saldo and Consumo endpoints return mock data in preview environment (Ta Telecom API requires real credentials). All data-testid attributes are in place for automated testing.

mocked_apis_list: Ta Telecom saldo/consumo API (returns mock data in preview environment)
Asaas payments API (sandbox key configured but may be blocked from preview container)

features_tested: Form validation for CPF length and phone length
